state.title: Run pre-validation script

input.command: cd /home/ishanp/Documents/GitHub/igs-mcp && node -e "const yaml=require('js-yaml'),fs=require('fs'); const pools=yaml.load(fs.readFileSync('config/pools.yml','utf8')); console.log('Pools:', pools.pools.length, 'Active:', pools.pools.filter(p=>p.is_active!==false).length); const sources=yaml.load(fs.readFileSync('config/sources.yml','utf8')); const social=sources.sources.filter(s=>s.type==='social_media'); console.log('Sources:', sources.sources.length, 'Social media:', social.length); console.log('IDs:', social.map(s=>s.id).join(', '))" 2>&1
